  1. recoder.java.reference
  2. ReferencePrefix

Uses of Interface
recoder.java.reference.ReferencePrefix

Packages that use ReferencePrefix
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.adt
This package contains RecodeR Operators which represent algebraic data type functions.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.expression
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing expressions.
recoder.java.expression.literal
This package contains representations for the various Java literal types.
recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.

    Description
    static String
    Naming.toPathName(ReferencePrefix ref)
    Creates the dotted path name for a reference prefix.
    static String

    Creates the dotted path name for a reference prefix and appends a suffix string.

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type ReferencePrefix
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(ReferencePrefix child, ArrayLengthReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(ReferencePrefix child, FieldReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsPrefix(ReferencePrefix child, New parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsPrefix(ReferencePrefix child, ArrayReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsPrefix(ReferencePrefix child, MethodReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static MethodDeclaration
    MethodKit.createAdapterMethod(ReferencePrefix delegationObject, MethodDeclaration method)
    Create a simple adapter method for a method declaration.
    static MethodReference
    MethodKit.createMethodReference(ReferencePrefix prefix, MethodDeclaration decl)
    makes a method reference to the method declaration with the same actual argument names as in the declaration.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(ReferencePrefix child, ArrayLengthReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(ReferencePrefix child, FieldReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
